name: em-claude-plugins
description: Personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins maintained by em

plugins.name: em-review
plugins.description: Standalone version of the em-workflow review phase. /em-review:review reviews the current git diff (whole codebase when no diff) with two-layer dynamic perspective selection, skill-injected generic reviewers (Claude + conditional GPT/Codex cross-validation), cross-model agreement scoring, and bounded auto-fix (≤ 3 loops, skip with --report-only). Never commits; records default to /tmp (--records <dir> to override). Also reviews GitHub PRs by number/URL (report-only).

plugins.name: em-workflow
plugins.description: Unified SDD + parallel-implementation + dynamic-review workflow. /em-workflow:develop drives spec → plan with task decomposition → wave-based parallel implementation in git worktrees → dynamic review selection (rule floor + discretion) → bounded auto-fix → retrospect collection. Skill-injected generic implementer/reviewer agents; review records persist per round.
